subject: large leonine beast with multiple curved horns, mouth open in roar, leaping through an urban corridor
description: A massive leonine creature with tawny fur and multiple curved backward-sweeping horns launches itself forward with its mouth wide open, fangs bared in a roar. Its large clawed forelimbs are extended. Scattered around the edges of the frame are dismembered limbs or debris — remnants of its rampage. The background shows pale grey stone architectural columns or pillars suggesting an urban or indoor setting. The creature's expression and posture convey uncontrolled aggression.
foreground: large horned leonine creature mid-leap, mouth open
